title: Bureta Faraimo
description: United States international rugby league footballer
extract:
Bureta Faraimo (born 16 July 1990) is a United States international rugby league footballer who plays on the wing for Hunslet in the RFL Championship on loan from Doncaster.
He has previously played for the Parramatta Eels in the NRL, and Hull F.C. in the Super League.
